title: teucrium commune var. purpurascens
intro: Teucrium commune var. purpurascens, also known as Purple Teucrium or Woodland Germander, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Purple Teucrium include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent to combat infections. The herb can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
